creator: stefan@FreeBSD.org
text:
Hi Andrew,

unfortunately, the port net/mDNSResponder, for which you sent a problem
report [1] doesn't have a maintainer (any more). You suggested making a
separate port for installing mDNSResponderPosix only. Can you provide a
new port or a a slave port for the existing one for that?

Regards,
Stefan

[1]: http://www.freebsd.org/cgi/query-pr.cgi?pr=ports/124548
